ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the food establishment */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the food establishment */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the establishment */,
  "establishment_type" TEXT /* Type of establishment (e.g., restaurant, food truck) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the establishment */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served (e.g., Italian, Mexican) */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being inspected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector conducting the inspection */,
  "results" TEXT /* Overall results of the inspection (e.g., pass, fail, conditional) */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, follow-up) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the inspection (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection in which the violation was noted */,
  "violation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of violation */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Risk category of the violation (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "correction_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if correction is required */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_violation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("violation_type_id") REFERENCES violation_types ("violation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violation_types" (
  "violation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the violation type (e.g., temperature control, sanitation issues) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the inspector (e.g., lead inspector, assistant) */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the inspector */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date of certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_up_inspections" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up inspection */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original inspection that prompted the follow-up */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up inspection */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the follow-up inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up inspection (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_up_inspections_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES inspections ("inspection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_categories" (
  "risk_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the risk category (e.g., Low Risk, Moderate Risk, High Risk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system (e.g., admin, inspector) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the action was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "facilitator" TEXT /* Facilitator of the training session */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the contact is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_contacts_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business the document is associated with */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., license, permit) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_documents_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspector_certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector the certification is associated with */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspector_certifications_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)
